programme.desc: A hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery.

programme.sub-title: Head of the Deck; Stew Department

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke encore: "The Middle"; Andy Serkis; Laufey; The Chick Mission; Philly Goat Project; Girli performs; guest hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Do You Have a Secret Baby?; Truth: $1400 Is Missing!
programme.desc: Random women are calling Eve about her boyfriend, Michael, and she suspects he's cheating, but Michael insists he's been honest throughout the relationship -- with trust on the line, everything hangs in the balance as Karamo unlocks the phones; Brandi says $1,400 went missing and she believes her cousin, Damyjai, took it; Damyjai swears she has no reason to steal any money and wants to clear her name. A bond is now broken, but can it be restored? It's a case of whodunit on today's "Karamo"!

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: Kyle apologizes to Paige, but underlying tensions continue with Craig; Jesse worries about his blossoming relationship with Lexi; Paige is surprised by Craig ́s concerns about her career.

programme.desc: Carl gets back in the game with a new girl; Kyle and Craig finally address the elephant in the room; a late-night rendezvous creates drama for the entire house.

programme.desc: Lindsay becomes convinced that Carl was untruthful with her while they were engaged; a revelation threatens to destroy Lexi and Jesse's relationship.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.sub-title: Jamie Lynn Sigler and Kj Dillard
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Jamie Lynn Sigler and Kj Dillard.

programme.title: The Kelly Clarkson Show
programme.desc: Kellyoke encore: "Ain't That Lonely Yet"; Ellen Burstyn; Charles Melton; Robert Smigel; bargains and deals with Lawrence Zarian and MorningSave; Dr. Lee Long (book "Wait, Where Am I in This?"); Willa Ford performs.

programme.title: Karamo
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Blocked From Grandma's Funeral; Unlock: You Broke My Heart ... Should I Break Our Lease?
programme.desc: Shannon and her cousin Sarah were inseparable until their grandmother passed away; then, Shannon says, Sarah turned the entire family against her -- but Sarah tells a different story, insisting that the family has gone above and beyond to support Shannon; Jada and Michael are struggling to move on while still living under the same roof -- Jada isn't ready to let go, and she wants Michael's phone unlocked to get the truth.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Joe and TJ heal old wounds; A stroll down King Street leads to chaos at Republic; TJ's Sir Wieners gets a huge endorsement; Joe reveals his fears about Maddi's DJ career.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Just as a new rumor about Will cheating drops in Charleston, everyone jets off to support Maddi at her big DJ gig in Las Vegas; after Brad leaves Lake in the friendzone, he starts to get second thoughts; a surprise guest drops in.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: After Brad can't help falling in love, Austin confronts Will; Joe's rattled that Grace put herself before Maddi; one lucky couple decides if it's now or never at a wedding chapel off the Vegas strip.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: TJ's anxiety mounts as he tries to impress Leva by hosting a Sir Wieners Launch at Republic; Lake introduces an old flame, which opens new wounds; while Emmy and Will have a moment of peace, Joe and Maddi's honeymoon phase faces some challenges.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Joe and Maddi's disagreements at home bleed into work; Michols confides in his stepdad; Lake makes some tough choices; Emmy invites the gang to prom; TJ takes matters into his own hands when he realizes Will is lying.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: Everyone dances their way to Prom Night; TJ and Brad's search for the truth about Will impacts everything, including their friendships; Austin finds out that gossiping has consequences; Grace Lilly's prom date shocks everyone.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.desc: After Joe throws Maddi a surprise party that doesn't go as planned, the group heads to the Dominican Republic for Maddi's first international gig.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jax spoils Kristen and Luke's engagement after Brittany reveals the news to him; Kristen and Zack are fed up with Brittany always choosing Janet over them; all hell breaks loose on a sunset cruise when Janet and Kristen reach their breaking points.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.sub-title: Making Up Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: In the wake of the cruise from hell, Janet struggles with insults Kristen threw at her; Danny and Nia look at a house as they get closer to their decision on having a fourth child; Jax and Brittany have an argument when discussing co-parenting.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jesse and Michelle experience a breakthrough in their relationship; Kristen comes to terms with her fertility journey; conflict takes the spotlight at Michelle's Zen party; Jax comes clean about his battles.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: As the cast reunites for their first-ever reunion, Kristen and Nia, now both eight months pregnant, relive their fertility journeys; Jesse and Michelle clash over the details of their impending divorce.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Jax opens up about his sobriety journey and continues to butt heads with Brittany over his actions last summer.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: While Kristen and Luke reminisce over their Hawaiian engagement, the argument between the Bookos and the Capernas threatens to derail happier memories; Jesse gets called to task by Andy; Zack extends an olive branch to Janet.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Janet's game night olive branch yields mixed results; Jesse gives Lacy a divorce update in hopes of taking things to the next level; Kristen and Luke continue to struggle with their communication.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Love and tension collide on the way to San Diego as relationships are tested.

programme.title: Southern Hospitality
programme.sub-title: Southern Hospitality Takes to the Sky and Immediately Regrets It: Can I Go Back Down?
programme.desc: Ziplining sounds fun until you're hundreds of feet in the air; watch the crew spiral, scream and question every decision.

programme.title: Watch What Happens Live With Andy Cohen
programme.desc: Andy Cohen interviews Ella Stiller and Zack Wickham.

programme.title: The Valley
programme.desc: Love and tension collide on the way to San Diego as relationships are tested.
